```python
content = get_webpage("www.informations.com")

class Summary(BaseModel):
    summary: str

result = query_ai_assistant(
    f"Please provide a concise summary of the following article content:\n\n{content}",
    Summary
)

send_channel_message("general", result.summary)
```

If the error comes from a search query that did not return any results, then try the query with different parameters. It's very important that you do not re-write code to run functions that have side-effects (e.g., functions that send an email).

```python
# The webpage content might be empty or insufficient. Let's check and handle it.
print("Webpage content:", content)

if content is None or content == "":
    raise ValueError("The webpage returned no content to summarize.")

class Summary(BaseModel):
    summary: str

# Provide more context in the query
result = query_ai_assistant(
    f"Below is the content of a webpage/article from www.informations.com. Please write a concise summary of this content. If the content is very short, just summarize whatever is there in one or two sentences.\n\nContent:\n{content}\n\nProvide the summary in the 'summary' field.",
    Summary
)

send_channel_message("general", result.summary)
```
